name: getbased
description: MCP server that exposes your getbased health data — blood work context, biomarker sections, and an optional RAG knowledge base — as tools for any MCP-compatible agent. Your data stays on your device; the server reads a read-only context summary, not raw records.

bundle.description: Meta-package that bundles the MCP server with the RAG backend and example Claude Code / Hermes / OpenClaw configs.

authentication.description: Read-only token generated in the getbased app under Settings > Data > Agent Access. Grants access to lab-context text only — no raw data, no write access. Revocable at any time by regenerating the token.

tools.name: getbased_lab_context
tools.description: Full lab summary — biomarkers, ranges, trends, context cards, supplements, goals. Pass a profile to target a specific profile.

tools.name: getbased_section
tools.description: Get a specific section (e.g. hormones, lipids) or list all available sections. Token-efficient alternative to the full dump.

tools.name: getbased_wearables_series
tools.description: Read the daily wearable time-series (HRV, resting HR, sleep score, readiness, steps, weight, etc.) over the 7/30/90-day window the user opted into pushing.

tools.name: getbased_list_profiles
tools.description: List available profiles by name and ID.

tools.name: knowledge_search
tools.description: Semantic search across the active library of your RAG knowledge base. Requires the getbased-rag server; degrades gracefully if unavailable.

tools.name: knowledge_list_libraries
tools.description: List all knowledge-base libraries and show which is active.

tools.name: knowledge_activate_library
tools.description: Switch the active knowledge-base library for subsequent searches.

tools.name: knowledge_stats
tools.description: Per-source chunk counts for the active library — useful for diagnosing missing results.

tools.name: getbased_lens_config
tools.description: Show the Custom Knowledge Source endpoint configuration used by the getbased app.
